description: Plexus Utils provides common Java utility classes historically used by Maven and Plexus-based projects. It includes helpers for file and IO handling, string manipulation, command-line execution, directory scanning, graph processing, introspection, and XML utilities.

Plexus Utils provides common Java utilities historically used by Apache Maven and Plexus-based projects. It includes helpers for file and IO handling, string manipulation, command-line execution, DAG processing, introspection, and XML utilities.
